THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANT JANICE RODGERS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS CONTINUED BY THE COURT TO JUNE 23, 2014 IN DEPT. 302, THIS IS NOT A HOUSING MATTER PER DEPT. 501. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JANICE RODGERS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND - JUDGE MILLER RECUSES HERSELF FROM THIS CASE. PLEASE IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MARLA J.
